name: Blondie

name: Brunette
description: A delicious hazelnut and caramel mocha. Decadently sweet and bold.

name: Smooth 7
description: Irish cream and white chocolate breve. The ultimate smooth pick-me-up.

name: Cinnamon Roll
description: Brown sugar cinnamon and white chocolate breve. Tastes just like a fresh pastry.

name: German Chocolate
description: Coconut and caramel mocha. A rich dessert-like coffee experience.

name: Snickerz

name: Triple Seven

name: Classic Latte

name: Classic Mocha
description: Rich espresso shots combined with sweet chocolate milk.

description: Traditional espresso coffee crafted with steamed half-and-half.

name: Classic Americano

name: Classic Cold Brew
description: Steeped slowly for 20 hours, creating an incredibly smooth and low-acid iced coffee.

name: Pumpkin Spice Dream

name: Cinnamon Roll Chiller

name: Sunrise
